title: tsiorchis wangii
side_effects: Tsiorchis wangii can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant may cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and decreased blood pressure. Furthermore, improper use of tsiorchis wangii can also lead to interactions with other medications, potentially exacerbating underlying health conditions.
